summary: Cinematic letterbox subtitle component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/subtitle-cinematic/src/SubtitleCinematic.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `SubtitleCinematic` and `subtitleCinematicDefaultProps`, then register the `SubtitleCinematic` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Subtitle Cinematic Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/subtitle-cinematic to my project. Preserve the exported SubtitleCinematicProps API and register the SubtitleCinematic composition with the default props.
